falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the HOLD signal by indicating a strong bullish trend contrary to the historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a potential reversal opposite to the historical pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 15 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp decline in volatility would contradict the expected market turbulence associated with the bottom_2022_may_luna pattern, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
